requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Basis and Site-Specific Interconnection

summary.en: Tanzania electricity regulation relies on EWURA electricity regulatory tools, including grid and distribution codes where applicable. Tanzania and China both use a 50 Hz power-system basis, which helps screen PCS, transformer, HVAC, and auxiliary-load compatibility, but it does not decide interconnection approval. Tanzania site review may require protection settings, voltage and frequency operating windows, anti-islanding, fault ride-through, harmonics, grounding, SCADA, metering, communications, commissioning tests, and site acceptance.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚电力监管依据EWURA电力监管工具，包括适用时的电网和配电规范。坦桑尼亚和中国均以50Hz电力系统为基础，这有助于筛查PCS、变压器、暖通和辅助负荷兼容性，但不能决定并网批准。坦桑尼亚场址审查可能要求保护整定、电压和频率运行窗口、防孤岛、故障穿越、谐波、接地、SCADA、计量、通信、调试测试和现场验收。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞電力監管依據EWURA電力監管工具，包括適用時的電網和配電規範。坦尚尼亞和中國均以50Hz電力系統為基礎，這有助於篩查PCS、變壓器、暖通和輔助負荷相容性，但不能決定併網批准。坦尚尼亞場址審查可能要求保護整定、電壓和頻率運行窗口、防孤島、故障穿越、諧波、接地、SCADA、計量、通信、調試測試和現場驗收。

standards_or_laws: Electricity (Grid and Distribution Codes) Rules, 2017 where applicable
Project-specific utility interconnection and commissioning requirements

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence and China 50 Hz design settings may support engineering review, but they are not Tanzania utility approval. PCS firmware, transformer taps, relay settings, harmonic limits, grounding, ambient-temperature derating, and SCADA should be validated for the Tanzania site.
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2023系统证据和中国50Hz设计整定可支持工程审查，但不是坦桑尼亚电网批准。应针对坦桑尼亚场址验证PCS固件、变压器分接、继电保护整定、谐波限值、接地、环境温度降额和SCADA。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2023系統證據和中國50Hz設計整定可支持工程審查，但不是坦尚尼亞電網批准。應針對坦尚尼亞場址驗證PCS韌體、變壓器分接、繼電保護整定、諧波限值、接地、環境溫度降額和SCADA。

gap.en: Produce Tanzania-specific relay settings, grid model, power-quality study, short-circuit study, SCADA protocol, commissioning plan, and site acceptance records instead of relying only on China factory settings.
gap.zh: 应制作坦桑尼亚特定继电保护整定、电网模型、电能质量研究、短路研究、SCADA协议、调试计划和现场验收记录，而不是仅依赖中国出厂整定。
gap.zht: 應製作坦尚尼亞特定繼電保護整定、電網模型、電能品質研究、短路研究、SCADA協議、調試計劃和現場驗收記錄，而不是僅依賴中國出廠整定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where Tanzania utility interconnection, grid-code, EWURA, EPC, owner, insurer, or commissioning approval applies; details are project and connection-point specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

source.publisher: Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The 50 Hz match is useful engineering context, not a Tanzania interconnection approval. Site-specific settings and commissioning remain separate requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 50Hz一致是有用的工程背景，不是坦桑尼亚并网批准。场址特定整定和调试仍是单独要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 50Hz一致是有用的工程背景，不是坦尚尼亞併網批准。場址特定整定和調試仍是單獨要求。
